name: Figma
description: Collaborative web-based interface design and prototyping tool used by product teams worldwide.

years.notes: Original mark introduced at public launch (September 27, 2016). Five-segment pill-shaped logomark with the classic Figma palette.

Brand refresh launched September 16, 2024. Simplified, more compact logomark with updated vibrant palette. mono.svg silhouette verified correct against color.svg; tool diff ratio 10.27% is an antialiasing false-positive at the color-vs-mono boundary.

notes: Non-square viewBox: 2016 is 200×300 (2:3), 2024 is 1024×1280 (4:5) — both match the intrinsic aspect ratio of the official mark. 2016/mono.svg silhouette verified correct; tool diff ratio is an antialiasing false-positive.
